mapper.insert: INSERT INTO PAYMENT_EXTERNAL_INFO (POS_TRX, ATTEMPT_SEQ, CARD_BIN, CARD_LAST4, MASKED_CARD_NO, CARD_BRAND, CARD_ISSUER, CARD_COUNTRY, VAN_PROVIDER, CREATED_AT, UPDATED_AT) VALUES (#{externalInfo.posTrx}, #{externalInfo.attemptSeq}, #{externalInfo.cardBin}, #{externalInfo.cardLast4}, #{externalInfo.maskedCardNo}, #{externalInfo.cardBrand}, #{externalInfo.cardIssuer}, #{externalInfo.cardCountry}, #{externalInfo.vanProvider}, #{externalInfo.createdAt}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP);
